steps.observed: Login form displayed with email, password, company code fields

steps.action: Fill credentials (validation.admin@example.com / Validation1!cc18570e52fe48dd / MOCK) and click Sign in
steps.observed: Redirected to hub page showing Admin, Accounting, Sales, Factory portal cards
Admin portal loaded with sidebar navigation and dashboard KPIs

steps.action: Navigate to Approvals page via sidebar
steps.observed: Approvals page loaded with 1 pending item: Credit Request CLR-3 for Mock GST Dealer, amount 15000, status PENDING

steps.action: Click Approve button on credit request CLR-3
steps.expected: Confirmation dialog appears with reason textarea
steps.observed: Confirmation dialog opened with title 'Approve Credit Request', a required reason textarea (placeholder 'Enter approval reason...'), Cancel and Approve buttons

steps.expected: Reason field marked as required with label and validation
steps.observed: Source code confirms 'Reason for approval *' label and validation that checks approveReason.trim() is non-empty. Textarea present at ref=e25.

steps.action: Fill reason textarea with 'Approved during Round 3 validation testing - reason field fix verification' and click Approve
steps.expected: API call succeeds with non-blank reason, item moves to approved, toast confirmation shown
steps.observed: Dialog closed, no error toast, page refreshed showing 'No pending items' and 'All items have been reviewed'. Success toast appeared briefly (auto-dismissed, Dismiss button was visible). No console errors.

evidence.network: POST /credit/limit-requests/{id}/approve with { reason: 'Approved during Round 3 validation testing - reason field fix verification' } — successful (item removed from pending list, success toast shown)

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-ADMIN-015 (Approve Action Processes Approval) PASS. The fix from commit 203ff10 is verified working — the approve confirmation dialog now includes a required reason textarea field. When a non-blank reason is provided, the API call succeeds (no 400 'reason must not be blank' error), the item is removed from the pending list, and a success toast is displayed. No console errors observed during the flow.
